# Resume Screening Agent (Uplizd) - Automated candidate data extraction and validation

## Summary
The Resume Screening Agent is an intelligent Uplizd workflow designed to streamline recruitment operations by automating the extraction, parsing, and validation of candidate data from resumes. By leveraging the Affinda API via the Composio Toolset, this solution eliminates manual data entry, reduces screening time, and ensures a single source of truth for candidate qualifications, allowing recruiters to focus on high-value talent engagement.

---

**Alt text (SEO-ready):** Resume Screening Agent workflow in Uplizd for automated candidate data extraction, parsing, and recruitment pipeline integration using Affinda and Composio.
